prompt_text:
### Demographics: 43-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 3 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints; Despite repeated counseling on insulin need, the patient strongly refuses injections; shared decision was made to intensify oral therapy and reassess within 2-4 weeks.

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent)
MASH
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF (No); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (paternal grandfather)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Glimepiride 2mg once daily; Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Olanzapine (10 mg nightly), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Nitrofurantoin (100 mg twice daily for prophylaxis)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 73.3 kg; Height 169.9 cm; BMI 25.4 kg/m²; Blood pressure 132/78 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 10.3%; 9 months ago 10.0%; 6 months ago 10.0%; 3 months ago 10.0%; current 10.0%), FPG (12 months ago 296mg/dL; 9 months ago 278mg/dL; 6 months ago 286mg/dL; 3 months ago 235mg/dL; current 300mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 74.1kg; 9 months ago 74.9kg; 6 months ago 73.1kg; 3 months ago 73.3kg; current 73.3kg), Height (12 months ago 169.9cm; 9 months ago 169.9cm; 6 months ago 169.9cm; 3 months ago 169.9cm; current 169.9cm), BMI (12 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 25.0kg/m²; current 25.4kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 130mmHg; 9 months ago 131mmHg; 6 months ago 132mmHg; 3 months ago 132mmHg; current 132mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 74mmHg; 9 months ago 76mmHg; 6 months ago 75mmHg; 3 months ago 77mmHg; current 78mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 91U/L; 9 months ago 81U/L; 6 months ago 74U/L; 3 months ago 76U/L; current 86U/L), AST (12 months ago 76U/L; 9 months ago 77U/L; 6 months ago 73U/L; 3 months ago 62U/L; current 77U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.1mg/dL; current 1.1mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 43mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 45mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 41mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 44mL/min/1.73m²; current 41mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 96mg/g; 9 months ago 111mg/g; 6 months ago 86mg/g; 3 months ago 120mg/g; current 115mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 91mg/dL; 9 months ago 84mg/dL; 6 months ago 91mg/dL; 3 months ago 90mg/dL; current 88mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 52mg/dL; 9 months ago 49mg/dL; 6 months ago 52mg/dL; 3 months ago 52mg/dL; current 50mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 151mg/dL; 9 months ago 132mg/dL; 6 months ago 129mg/dL; 3 months ago 130mg/dL; current 139mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.2g/dL; 6 months ago 12.9g/dL; 3 months ago 12.2g/dL; current 12.3g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited. Strong injection refusal is documented; under shared decision-making, the patient accepts oral regimen adjustment with short-interval reassessment.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
